checks.name: navbar authenticated visibility bound to canonical user
checks.detail: AppShell authenticated nav should require canonical authenticated user state.

checks.name: role gate does not block solely on persistent session
checks.detail: RoleGate should only wait on unresolved persisted session, not every persisted state.

checks.name: require auth keeps hydration and redirect phases deterministic
checks.detail: RequireAuth must preserve deterministic transition from hydrating to redirect/allow.

checks.name: login page waits only for unresolved hydration
checks.detail: Login page should not spin forever after auth resolves.

checks.name: auth hydration has explicit boundaries and retry behavior
checks.detail: Hydration boundaries and /auth/me retry behavior must be explicit.
